## Meeting Purpose

[Review and explain Looker dashboard functionality for Discern account](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Looker dashboard pulls data directly from Google Analytics 4 and Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Manual process now required for exporting data from Airtable to Looker (temporary solution)](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Content managers should update data weekly, ideally on Mondays before client syncs](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [Engagement rate benchmark is 50-60%, with higher rates indicating strong performance](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)

## Topics

### Dashboard Overview and Data Sources

  - [Dashboard pulls data directly from Google Analytics 4 and Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Overall tab shows data for entire website, while other tabs focus on specific metrics](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [URL cohorts filter allows isolation of GrowthX-created content](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Session medium typically filtered to organic and referral traffic](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Engagement rate defined as 1+ minute on page or clicking to another page](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)

### Non-Branded Performance Metrics

  - [Non-branded tab excludes brand keywords (e.g., "discern", "discern.io")](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [Click data for individual searches is inaccurate due to Google limitations](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Impression data and overall trends remain accurate and useful](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)

### Conversion Events and Content Pillars

  - [Conversion events tab pulls all GA4 events, allowing custom tracking](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [Cohorts tab breaks down performance by content pillars](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Landing pages tab allows tracking of individual URL performance over time](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)

### LLM Referrals and Benchmarks

  - [LLM tab shows referral traffic from AI platforms (e.g., ChatGPT, Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Engagement rate benchmark is 50-60%, with higher rates indicating strong performance](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
  - [Discern seeing significant growth in LLM referrals (7 to 20+ sessions)](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)

### Data Updates and Reporting Process

  - [Manual process now required for exporting data from Airtable to Looker](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Content managers should update data weekly, ideally on Mondays](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
  - [CMs prepare initial client meeting agendas, including performance updates](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jenn to review video tutorials for manual data update process](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [Team to continue migrating accounts to new Looker dashboard template](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
  - [Explore potential for custom graph creation in Atlas as a long-term solution](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [Jenn to follow up with any additional questions after reviewing materials](https://fathom.video/share/baw1wmhUWgxN2aRuWFeaWCYb7xLZmbL3?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
